titleStmt.title: SII 18.191: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 191. (B.K. No. 99 of 1933-34.) HŪLIHAḶḶI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab leaning against the front wall of the temple of Rāmaliṅga.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva is dated in Śaka 1104, Śubhakṛit, Mārgas11ira śu. Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse. The details are irregular. In the cyclic year cited, Pūrṇimā in the month of Mārgaśira did not fall on Monday nor was there any lunar eclipse on that day. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1182 November 12, Friday.

It gives the genealogy of the Gutta chief Vikramāditya II and states that Nāḷprabhu Kēta-gāvuṇḍa made a grant of land to Kalyāṇas11akti-Paṇḍita, for offerings etc., to god Rāmēśvara. The genealogy of Kēta-gāvuṇḍa is also given. As in No. 192, here also Vikramāditya II is called the son of Jōyidava II. Ulihaḷḷi (modern Hūlihaḷḷi) is praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanagarā
raṁbhāmūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīsakaḷēśanaṁ harananakṣaya
naṁ girijādhināthanaṁ kēśavapadmajādinikhiḷāmarakhēcarabhūcarōragēṁ
drāsurayakṣapūjitapadāṁbujayugmananādinātha rāmēśa śara
ṇyameṁbacaḷabhaktajanakkabhivriddhi maṁgaḷaṁ . jayatyānaṁdasandōhajñānai
śvaryyaṁ mayassadā(ḥ) . yicchāmātrasamutpaṁnaṁ samastabhuvana śivaṁ . © This verse is corrupt.
© varaphēnānēkaśuṁbhadubahaḷatarataraṁgaṁgaḷoṁdoṁdanoṁdaṁ bharadiṁ taḷupoyai mēliṁgogeFrom this line onward � text are numbered in the inscription.
du poḷeva sīrmmuttiveṁbaṁte sūsuttiralōraṁturbbi tuṁturppanigaḷasadaḷaṁ celuvanāḷda
ttu kūrmmōddhurapāṭhīnādibhāsvaduguḷuguḷita gaḷadhvānaraudraṁ samudra . varakū
rmmēṁdraṁ sukaṁdaṁ phaṇipativimaḷōttāḷanāḷaṁ diśāsiṁdhuravudyadugōtrabhūbhri
tkuḷadaḷanicayaṁ kēsaraṁ dēśabhāsvatpurasaṁdōhaṁ samaṁtuṁnatadivijanagaṁ karṇnikākāra
maṁ tāḷdire jaṁbūdvīpavabujōdbhapajanitasarōjātavintoppi tōrkku . piriduṁ madhya
stavā dvīpadoḷamaranagaṁ tannagēṁdrakke teṁkalu bharatakṣētraṁ janānaṁdamano
davipudā kṣētradoḷu nāḍeyuṁ saundaralakṣmījanmagēhaṁ nutabhuvanavadhūkuṁtaḷaṁ
tānenalu vistarisikkuṁ kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷavakhiḷasudhāḷaṁkritōdyaduviḷāsaṁ . kaṁ .
Aṁtenipa kuṁtaḷōrbbīkāṁtege patiyenisi vairinripakuḷaviḷayōgrāṁtakanesedaṁ
dōrbbalakauntēyaṁ bijjaṇaṁ parākramabhīmaṁ . vri . dhuradhīraṁ bijjaṇōrvvī patinutana ta
nūjātanudyadvinūtōddhuratējaṁ puṁṇyapuṁjaṁgaḷacuryyakuḷāṁbhōjasanu
mitranuduvrittara gaṁḍaṁ yuddhaśauṁḍaṁ sogayipanenasuṁ rāyanārā
yaṇaṁ vistarakīrttiśrīviḷāsaṁ vasudheyoḷadaṭidnā (ṁdā)humallakṣitīśaṁ . sarasvatē nama .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjanapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavriṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍama
rugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ subhaṭarāditya kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ
śanivārasiddhi giridurggamallaṁ gajasāmaṁtagaḷacuryyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ
yityēva nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
tatpādapadmōpajīviyappa śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vikramādityadēvana pratā
paveṁteṁdaḍe . vri . maledidirānta va ṇḍaḷikaraṁ biḍadaṁḍaledājiraṁgadoḷu baladi
naḍurttu geldu nijakīrttiyanintu digdaṁtidaṁtadoḷu nilisiye vikramāṁkanavanī taḷado
ḷu balicārudattaraṁ gelavaralittaḍarttigadaṭiṁ pratipāḷisalī dharitriyaṁ . kaṁ . siṁgakkekēsaraṁ
mātaṁgakke madāṁbuvogevavole(lo)gedanadātaṁge vibhujōyidēvanasaṁgata vikhyātabhūtaḷā
dhīśvararoḷu . maṁḍaḷikabhayiravaṁ vibhu gaṁḍaroḷī jōyidēvaneṁdavanīśarggaṁḍaḷedu vastuvā
hanabhaṁḍāramanittutettubāḷvarppalaru . Ātana taneyaṁ bhuvanakhyātaṁ śrīvikramā[�]
kanatyadhikabaḷōpētaṁ hēḷāsādhyade bhūtaḷasāmā(mrā)jyalakṣmiyaṁ taḷedirddaṁ . va . [A]
ntu bhuvanabhūbhāgadoḷu viśēṣamāda banavāse paṁnicchāsidoḷeseva biṁna vūra haṁ
neraḍakke śikhāmaṇiyiddaṁtiddulihaḷḷiya mahāprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . vri . suru
cirakīrttiyaṁ taḷeda vikramabhūpatiyāḷva nāḍoḷaṁbara dharaṇīpriyāṁganegaḷaṁkri tameṁ
bavoloppitōṟuguṁ karame viśiṣṭariṁ vibudhasaṁgatiyiṁ gaṇikājanaṁgaḷiṁ smaranaralaṁ
binaṁtadulihaḷḷiyuvoppuvudāva nāḍoḷaṁ . suttida taṭākakūpadinuttuṁgaśivā
layaṁgaḷiṁ naṁdanadiṁ karttalipu�yānadoḷesevuttamadulihaḷḷi lakṣmigēṁ neleyāytō .
Ā purada puruṣarellaṁ śrīpadasaṁpaṁnaradhikapuṇyōdayareṁdāpottuṁ nelasippaḷu
śrīpadmanivāsi kētavibhuvina puradoḷ . biṁnavuranāḷge tilakavaduṁnataduliha
ḷḷiyalliya prabhugaḷavarmmunninayugada caritrarmmaṁnisi budhajanaranoldu
rakṣisutipparu . va . Antavaranvayakhyātiyeṁteṁdaḍe . mallaṁ paravadhuvina
baravollaṁ saṁgrāmavalli hulugaccidaraṁ kollaṁ bēḍidavarggilleṁnaṁ kuḍuva dāni parahi
tacaṁtaṁ . nuḍadilleṁna bēḍidaḍeyuḍugaḷekuḍuvanedaṟuvarigaḷa taleyaṁ poḍeseṁḍāḍu
vareṁdaḍe poḍaviyali baṁmagauṁḍagāruṁ doreye . Ātana kulavadhu negaḷdī bhūtaḷadoḷu caṁ
dikayveyuṁ bāgaveyuṁ mātēṁ sucaritreyaraṁtātaṁgana ka (kū)leyarāgi naḍeyuttirppa
ru . va . Ātana tammaṁ kēśavanāyakanudāraguṇaveṁteṁdaḍe . Āseyane tōṟi budhara vi
ḷāsaṁ kiḍuvaṁnamirisi tudiyoḷu pusiyiṁ bēsaṟisi kaḷevakrityada rāsigaḷaṁ kēsiyaṁ
ṇnanēṁ meccuvanē . nuḍidaḍe karnnana vacanaṁ kuḍuveḍeyoḷu cārudattanā baliguttaṁ kuḍuvaṁ
dade kuḍutippaṁ poḍaviyalayciṇnaneṁdu pogaḷvudu lōkaṁ . vāsavapatiniḷayava
nīdēśaṁ pogaḷvaṁtu baṁmagāvuṁḍanmākēśavanāyakanuṁ rāmēśabhavālaya manartthiyiṁ
māḍisidaru . va . Aṁtu rāmanāthadēvāleyamaṁ līleyiṁ māḍisi sukhadinippudu
mā kēśavanāyakaṁgaṁ gaṁgauyvegaṁ daśarata(tha)ṁge rāmalakṣmaṇarppuṭṭuvante mallagauṁḍanaṁ
sāvantakētagāvuṁḍaṁnuṁ suputrarkkuladīpakarenisi nāḷprabhutvamaṁ taḷedu baḷe
yevaḷayelā mallagāvuṁḍana permmeyeṁtene . ka . cārutaravabudhiparivritadhāri
ṇītaḷadoḷage sakaḷaguṇasaṁpadaneṁdōraṁte phogaḷvarīva vudārateyaṁ malla gavuṁḍanaṁ jagame
llaṁ . Ātanamajātanupamātītaṁ vidviṣṭaduṣṭasāmaṁtamadanumātaṁgasiṁhaneṁbudu bhū
taḷadoḷu kētagavuṁḍanaṁ palarolaviṁ . śrīmannāḷprabhu kētaṁ sāmaṁtara dēva sakaḷa guṇasaṁ
padanuddāma�rarūpayuvatīkāmaṁ saṁgrāmabhīma caladoḷu rāmaṁ . vri . ©
toḍarddarigaḷge bilviḍiye saṁgaradoḷu raghujātanaṁdadiṁ naḍugisuguṁ viśiṣṭareḍaṟōḍu
vinaṁ kuḍuvallicāgadoḷu paḍiyiḍuguṁ suradrumamanoḷguṇadoḷpu payaṟpa
yōdhiyaṁ jaḍigumadeṁdoḍē vogaḷvuduṁnatiyaṁ vibhukētagauṁḍana(ṁ) . kaṁ . rāmaṁge hanu
manaṁdade jōmaṁguṟadaḍaṟuvarigaḷaṁ caladiṁ saṁgrāmadoḷ kolvanadaṭiṁ sāmaṁtalalāmanī kētanati
vikhyātaṁ . lalanāratnavenipparkkulavadhugaḷu kētagauṁḍanoḷu nijāleya gauṇ
ḍiyiṁtivarolaviṁdaṁ negaḷda cittavallabheyādaru . Ātana saṁdhivigrahi . kaṁ .
dvijakulalalāmanappī sujanāgraṇi sēnabōva sōmayyananī trijagaṁ baṇnipudo
ppuva nijaguṇavaṁ saccaritradoṁduṁnnatiyaṁ . © svasti śrīmatu sakavaruṣa sā
yiradanūṟanālkeneyana 1104 neya śubhakritsaṁvatsarada mārggaśira suddha paurnnami
sōmavāramuṁ sōmagrahaṇamuṁ byatīpātamuṁ kūḍibaralu śrīmaṁnāḷprabhu
sāvaṁta kētagāvuṁḍaṁ taṁmānvayadiṣṭā(ṣṭa)deyva śrīrāmēśvaradēvara khaṁḍa
sphuṭitajīrnnōddhāra nivēdyakkaṁ biṭṭa bhūmi hiriya keṟeya keḷage tōṁṭakkekaṁ
baṁ hattu 10 gadde kaṁbavippattu 20 koṁḍadiṁ baḍaga Eremattaroṁdu kaṁba mūvattu
Erema 1 ka 20 rāmēśvaradēvariṁ paḍuvalu makkimattaloṁdu 1 Ekaliṁ mūḍalu keṁgā
ḍu mattalondu 1 maṁ gāṇadalu sollageyeṇne dhānyadalu dēvagoḷaga dharmmago
ḷagaveraḍu koḷaga 2 yiṁtinitumaṁ svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhā
raṇamō nānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa kalyāṇaśaktipaṁḍitargge
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . kriyi(ye)yiṁ
diṁtidaneyde kāyda puruṣaṁgāyuṁ mahāśrīyumakkeyidaṁ kā
yade kāydī pāpige kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷu vāraṇāsiyoḷe kōṭi
munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudoṁdayasaṁ sārggumideṁdu sā
ṟepuduvī śaiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu . sāyiraguḍiya kētōjana khaṁḍaraṇe .
Digital edition of SII 18.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
